biological_replicate: we imaged BRM in 3rd instar larval salivary gland polytene nuclei.
technical_replicate: We measured local chromatin condensation and its effect on BRM association.
experimental_design: We used live-cell imaging of Drosophila polytene nuclei to monitor Brahma (BRM) remodeler interactions with its chromosomal targets.
factor_value: loss of ATP hydrolysis enhanced chromatin retention and clustering of BRM.
